india_trends.title: Stock Market Live Updates: Stock to buy today: Jio Financial Services (₹253.75)
india_trends.summary: Sensex, Nifty updates on Apr 28: The stock of Jio Financial Services rallied 3.2 per cent on Monday and broke out of the resistance ₹248. Thus, after a downtrend and some consolidation, the fresh breakout serves as a strong indication that the trend is turning bullish.

india_trends.title: Korea Passes UK to Become World’s Eighth-Largest Stock Market
india_trends.summary: South Korea has leapfrogged the UK to become the world’s eighth-biggest stock market, fueled by a high-octane rally in its artificial intelligence-linked technology champions.

india_trends.title: Pre-market action: Here's the trade setup for today's session
india_trends.summary: Indian stock markets closed higher on Monday. The Nifty index saw a gain of 0.8%. Analysts anticipate a continued gradual upward trend. Positive global sentiment and sector-specific developments are expected to drive market activity. Renewable energy and metals stocks are likely to attract attention

india_trends.title: BoJ policy decision LIVE: Bank of Japan interest rate likely to remain unchanged; all eyes on governor's comment
india_trends.summary: BoJ policy decision LIVE: Most economists expect the BOJ to keep the policy rate steady at 0.75% at the end of its two-day meeting today, even as the yen hovers near levels that have prompted past interventions.

india_trends.title: India launches investigation on some aluminium wire products from Malaysia
india_trends.summary: India has initiated a probe into aluminium wire imports from Malaysia. This comes as existing import duties are scheduled to expire in September. Several Indian companies have requested a review to determine if these duties need to be extended. The government's announcement was made late on Monday.

india_trends.title: Oil prices rise as no end to Iran war stand-off seems in sight
india_trends.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump is unhappy with the latest Iranian proposal aimed at ending ‌the war, a ⁠U.S. official ⁠said on Monday. Iranian sources disclosed on Monday that Tehran's proposal avoided addressing its nuclear program ​until hostilities cease and Gulf shipping disputes are resolved.

india_trends.title: The bond market is sleepy. A sharp move may be coming.
india_trends.summary: While testimony from Federal Reserve chair nominee Kevin Warsh did nothing to wake up the sleepy Treasury market, there are catalysts for a breakout this week and beyond.

india_trends.title: Firms postpone D-Street debut as uncertainty clouds market outlook
india_trends.summary: Dozens of companies are delaying IPO plans due to volatile investor sentiment and geopolitical concerns, impacting market valuations. While the year began strong, a recent slowdown has seen a significant drop in new listings. Experts anticipate a market pickup in June, contingent on global stability

india_trends.title: RBI tightens oversight on offshore rupee trades with new FX reporting rules
india_trends.summary: The Reserve Bank of India is bringing offshore rupee derivative trades under its regulatory watch. Authorized dealers must now report over-the-counter FX contracts, both deliverable and non-deliverable, to enhance oversight of price discovery. This move aims to curb market volatility. india_trends.summary: Banks faced significant trading losses in Q4 2025-26 due to rising interest rates and forex market corrections, impacting profitability.
